name: CPN Retail Growth Leasehold REIT
summary: CPN Retail Growth Leasehold REIT (√Ç¬ìCPNREIT√Ç¬î) is Thailand's largest retail-focused real estate investment trust listed on the Stock Exchange of Thailand (√Ç¬ìSET√Ç¬î). CPNREIT was established from the conversion of CPN Retail Growth Leasehold Property Fund (√Ç¬ìCPNRF√Ç¬î) which was set up and publicly traded on the SET since 2005. Upon conversion on 1 December 2017, CPNREIT acquired all CPNRF's quality portfolio, and invested in a new mix-used project consisting of CentralFestival Pattaya Beach shopping center and Hilton Pattaya. At present, CPNREIT invested in a well-diversified portfolio of 5 shopping centers and 1 hotel across Thailand's prime destinations.
